metadata.description: Marketplace hosting the Humanize PPT brief-orchestrator plugin.

plugins.name: humanize-ppt
plugins.description: 面向 Agent 的 PPT 渲染质检员:把资料编排成 AST 大纲+逐页素材决定的简报,交给下游 PPT Skill(guizang/frontend-slides)100%原生渲染,再盯住渲染结果——QA 循环扫失败模式、写 fix prompt、3 轮封顶。Humanize 自己不渲染。PPT is an audience-state changer, not an information container.
